untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) 'estimated fundamental value' — not available as a standard indicator; (2) 'dealer inventory accumulation signal' — requires order flow or dealer position data not in allowed indicators; (3) 'sustained bid/ask imbalance' — requires market microstructure data (bid/ask spreads) not provided. Translated using price-to-MA discount and volume spike as proxies, but core dealer inventory mechanics cannot be fully captured.
translation_notes: Approximated 'price discount to fundamental value' using close < sma_50 (medium-term fair value proxy). Approximated 'dealer inventory accumulation + volume spike' using vol_ratio_20 > 1.5 (volume confirmation). Exit when price mean-reverts back above SMA_50. Stop loss set to 2% as conservative default for mean reversion trades. Original signal requires microstructure data (bid/ask imbalance, dealer positions) unavailable in standard OHLCV indicators.
